title: cogswellia dasycarpa
intro: Cogswellia dasycarpa, also known as the Chinese or Indian dodonaea, is a plant species that belongs to the family Sapindaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cogswellia dasycarpa include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
